task_completion.description: Open the correct project in DreamPlan Home Design Software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan Home Design Software interface is visible with the 'Contemporary House' project loaded (as per privileged info, this represents the 'Sample House').

task_completion.description: Locate and select the master bedroom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The master bedroom's walls or floor area are clicked, highlighted, or selected in the 2D or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Increase the width of the master bedroom by 2 feet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The master bedroom is visibly wider, or a dimension label/properties panel shows the width has increased by 2 feet compared to its original state.

task_completion.description: Initiate the save process for the updated project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' file dialog window is open over the DreamPlan interface.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the specified path and filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file dialog shows the directory path as '/home/ga/Documents/' and the file name entered as 'Sample House.ddp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the DreamPlan GUI to modify the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications are made within the DreamPlan Home Design Software interface, not by editing a project file in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely resized the room using software tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor dragging walls or typing new dimensions into the DreamPlan properties panel is visible.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is saved via the DreamPlan 'Save As' dialog, rather than using terminal commands (like cp or mv) to rename or move an existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application used is 'DreamPlan Home Design Software' (window title contains 'DreamPlan'). Although the task description asks to modify the 'Sample House' project, the actual built-in sample project provided in the environment is named 'Contemporary House'. Accept modifications to 'Contemporary House' as fulfilling the 'Sample House' requirement.
